title: AgentLinux Catalog
description: Catalog of available agents. Each entry is opt-in (CAT-02). Stability-first pinning (ADR-011): every entry carries a required pinned_version.

version.description: Catalog manifest version (not an agent version)

requires_secret.description: ENABLE-02: true when this entry needs a credential to function. Declarative metadata — the recipe prints the post-install instruction; the secret is never baked into the recipe/snapshot. Introduced for MCP-server entries but usable by any source_kind that needs a post-install credential. Absent → no secret required.

secret_env.description: ENABLE-02: name of the environment variable that carries this entry's credential (e.g. CONTEXT7_API_KEY). Set when a secret is used at all — required or optional. The user supplies it post-install; it is never baked.

endpoint_url.description: ENABLE-02 remote-http: the pinned HTTPS endpoint of a hosted remote MCP server (e.g. https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/). A hosted MCP is a rolling service with no semver — the URL is its stability contract, and pinned_version names the curated upstream server release the endpoint is validated against. Absent for npm/script/binary and stdio-mcp entries.

pinned_version.description: Exact semver pinned by this catalog release (CAT-04 / ADR-011). For a hosted remote-http MCP with no downloadable release (endpoint_url set, no upstream package), this instead carries the endpoint's GA date shaped as YYYY.M.D (e.g. 2026.2.17) — the validated-against marker, since the URL is the real stability contract.

version_constraint.description: Optional semver range (e.g. '^2.1') that --all-latest upper-bounds against

compatibility_window.description: Semver range (e.g., '>=2.0.0 <3.0.0'); REUSE-03 adopts a detected install whose version satisfies it. Optional.

preserve_paths_file.description: Optional path (relative to the agent's catalog dir) to a sibling preserve_paths.json. The loader injects the listed paths into AGENTLINUX_PRESERVE_PATHS for uninstall.sh (CAT-04). Absent → nothing preserved across REMEDIATE-04 reinstall.

test_only.description: Hide from default `list`; exercised by bats
